data.title: Pearl Street Capital Partners launches Panther Service Group, a new plumbing, HVAC and electrical services platform focused in Florida
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on April 1, 2026, Pearl Street Capital Partners (PSCP) unveiled the creation of Panther Service Group (PSG), a comprehensive plumbing, HVAC, and electrical services platform operating in Florida. The aim of PSG is to collaborate with top-tier businesses in the plumbing, HVAC, and electrical sectors to establish a robust service network in the state.

data.title: ATRI Launches Motor Carrier Survey on Telematics Uses and Benefits
data.description: On April 1, 2026, the American Transportation Research Institute (ATRI) urged motor carriers to take part in a survey aimed at pinpointing industry telematics applications for performance metrics based on data. This survey is a component of a study being conducted to analyze...
Bassett Reports Fiscal First Quarter Results

data.title: Xcel Brands to Host Fourth Quarter and Year End 2025 Earnings Call on April 7, 2026
data.description: Xcel Brands, Inc. disclosed plans to release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on April 7, 2026. The report will be followed by a conference call for investors scheduled for the same day at 5:00 p.m. ET. Xcel, trading on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol XELB, will provide insights into its performance during this period, offering stakeholders valuable information to assess the Company's progress.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow, Nasdaq Higher After Trump's War Comments; Energy Stocks Plunge (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase following President Trump's announcement that Iran's new president is seeking a halt in hostilities. Both the Dow and Nasdaq showed gains in response to this news. However, energy stocks saw a decline amidst the market activity. The positive market movement came after Trump's statements regarding the potential for a ceasefire with Iran's new leadership.

data.title: Driven Brands (DRVN) Faces Securities Suit Following Accounting Errors, Internal Control Failures - Hagens Berman
data.description: On April 1, 2026, a prominent shareholder rights law firm, Hagens Berman, announced the initiation of a securities class action lawsuit against Driven Brands Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: DRVN) and its executives. Investors are being urged to submit their losses related to DRVN.

data.title: Visual Bank Expands “Qlean Dataset” to Support Large-Scale Japanese Speech Foundation Models
data.description: Visual Bank, based in Tokyo, has recently announced the expansion of their Qlean Dataset. This development includes over 100,000 hours of Japanese audio content that has been cleared for rights usage in AI applications. The dataset is supported by amanaimages, a company with over 40 years of experience in this field. This initiative is set to significantly enhance AI capabilities utilizing Japanese audio content.

data.title: ODDITY Tech. (ODD) Sued After Shares Plunge 49% on AI Platform Disruption and Revenue Decline -- Hagens Berman
data.description: On April 1, 2026, a securities class action lawsuit was initiated against ODDITY Tech. Ltd. (NASDAQ: ODD) by investors who bought ODDITY securities from February 26, 2025, to February 24, 2026. The legal action came after a significant 49% drop in the stock's value during that period.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- FCA US LLC/
data.description: FCA US LLC has reported a 4% year-over-year increase in first-quarter sales. The company clarified that certain figures in the chart have been adjusted for accuracy. The updated release provides a comprehensive overview of FCA US's performance in the first quarter of the year.

data.title: Electrolit® Returns to Coachella as Official Hydration Sponsor, Bringing 5K and Wellness Programming to Festivalgoers
data.description: Electrolit®, the leading rapid hydration drink, is further establishing its presence in festival culture by enhancing performance, movement, and hydration. This premium hydration beverage is a favorite in various high-performance settings, ranging from work to sports. This development comes amidst the brand's ongoing evolution.

data.title: Soleno (SLNO) Sued After DCCR Launch Setback, Share Drop-- Hagens Berman
data.description: On April 1, 2026, it was reported that a securities class action lawsuit has been initiated against Soleno Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: SLNO). This legal action aims to represent investors who bought Soleno common stock within the period of March 26, 2025, to November 4, 2025. The lawsuit was filed following certain events related to Soleno's activities during that time frame.

data.title: Mitsubishi Motors Reports First Quarter 2026 Sales
data.description: In Franklin, Tennessee on April 1st, 2026, Mitsubishi Motors North America, Inc. (MMNA) announced that their sales for the first quarter of 2026 reached 26,884 units. This figure represents a 15% decrease compared to the previous year's first-quarter sales. The decline was primarily attributed to the discontinuation of the Mirage subcompact sedan, which concluded production in the late quarter.

data.title: Trip.com (TCOM) Sued After AI Pricing Controversy and Anti-Monopoly Probe Sends Shares Tumbling -- Hagens Berman
data.description: On April 1, 2026, a securities class action lawsuit was initiated against Trip.com Group, the biggest online travel agency in China, traded under NASDAQ as TCOM. The lawsuit aims to represent investors who bought Trip.com securities from April 30, 2024, through January 13, 2026.

data.title: DAVID WEEKLEY HOMES RANKS NO. 14 ON FORTUNE 100 BEST COMPANIES TO WORK FOR LIST
data.description: In Houston, on April 1, 2026, David Weekley Homes commemorates its 50th anniversary of "Building Dreams, Enhancing Lives." The company achieved a notable accomplishment by being named to Fortune magazine's esteemed 100 Best Companies to Work For® list for the 20th time. The recognition showcases the company's commitment to providing a positive work environment.

data.title: Quartz Manufacturing Alliance of America Commends ITC for Affirmative Injury Determination in Global Safeguard Case
data.description: On April 1, 2026, the U.S. International Trade Commission (ITC) received praise from the Quartz Manufacturing Alliance of America (QMAA) for its decision regarding the Global Safeguard petition filed in September. The petition aimed to address issues within the quartz industry. The ITC made an affirmative injury determination, supporting the claims made by the coalition. This decision is significant for the industry as it acknowledges the challenges faced, and it sets the stage for potential changes and support in this sector.
